hero.description: Passionate about frontend and fullstack, I build web experiences that have meaning and style.

about2.title: About
about2.p1: Former professional dancer turned into coding — I have always needed to create, to build, to see the concrete result of my work.
about2.p2: Today Application Developer Designer (Bachelor's degree level, diploma in progress), application support technician on a permanent contract and freelance since March 2026, I am in the middle of transitioning to the job I am truly passionate about: fullstack development.
about2.p3: React, React Native, JavaScript, HTML/CSS — and an ambitious personal project in progress, designed to have a real impact. Based in Paris, available for opportunities that have meaning.
